name: aitest
description: Codex workflows for AITest Kit: initialize workspaces, generate tests, run reports, and explain failures without duplicating the CLI core.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and run maintainable tests from docs
interface.longDescription: AITest guides Codex users from project or API documents to test knowledge, Markdown cases, generated pytest, structured reports, failure triage, and rule promotion review. The plugin is a thin workflow layer over the aitest-kit CLI.
defaultPrompt: Generate pytest from my AITest Markdown cases
